name: rakumo Inc.
summary: rakumo Inc. develops and sells cloud-based extension tools in Tokyo, Japan. Its products include rakumo for G Suite, a cloud-type extension tool group that shares the user management, authentication, and security functions of G Suite; and rakumo for Salesforce, a cloud extension tool that includes rakumo Social Scheduler, which changes the behavior of daily schedule to change the next behavior, as well as rakumo Sync that synchronizes with Google Calendar schedule in real time. The company is also involved in the sale of information and communication equipment and software. rakumo Inc. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
